vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements.description: Provide a fixed-wing flying-wing UAV center pod with an equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, and motor pylon at rear.
Ensure cooling air flows from the inlet to the motor pod.
Allow the bay door to open and close.
Mount a motor pylon at the rear.
Include a motor mount and bolt circle for the motor pylon.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on cooling inlet due to rapid temperature changes.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests during validation phase.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at motor pylon mount under extreme loads.
risk.mit: Perform load testing and reinforce if necessary.

risk.desc: Limited access for maintenance at service access port.
risk.mit: Increase size of service access port for better access.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment at bay door hinge due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances and conduct alignment checks.

risk.desc: Potential for fastener loosening at bolt circle over time.
risk.mit: Apply anti-loosening compounds and conduct periodic inspections.

risk.mit: Ensure proper torque application and use of locknuts on all bolts.

risk.mit: Include clearance around cooling inlet to ensure unobstructed airflow.

risk.desc: Propeller attachment may be compromised if snap-fit mechanism fails.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and testing to validate snap-fit strength.

risk.desc: Electrical harness connection may be compromised if connector mate is not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure proper alignment and secure fastening of electrical harness connector.
